title: turnera involucrata
intro: Turnera involucrata, also known as Damiana, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Turnera involucrata include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as improved libido and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Damiana can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
